title: JBCクラシックの後に・未知なる咆哮

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After the race, the trio meet at the runners' tunnel
to celebrate their performance.

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff... Rickey, Acute! I went all out today!

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text:
I managed to use every ounce of my strength! I'm
back to my old self... No, I've gotten even better!

text_block_list.name: Wonder Acute
text_block_list.text:
You two were incredible out there. But I threw in
a little of the wisdom I've accumulated over the
years.

text_block_list.name: Wonder Acute
text_block_list.text:
There are tons of different ways to run. I'll show
you even more of them from here on out!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
(The cheering—it's still going. And this feeling of
satisfaction in me...)

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
(I can sense it. This space is full. In perfect
harmony.)

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
My running, our running—this is the Four
Guardians in balance. Each one mighty—each one
equal!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
I may have stumbled along the way, but now I've
made it!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Feng shui helped me better myself. It helped me
help others, and it brought us to a place where we
can all compete with smiles on our faces.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Now, I can show the world the power of feng shui!
I can make everyone happy!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Tiiing, tiiing...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Huh? That sound just now...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
That was the roar of the Azure Dragon. A roar of
joy, coming from... my heart?

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Wait, that's not the Azure Dragon!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: It's a different dragon! That must mean...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: I thought I'd be satisfied once I got here...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: But now, I...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Several days later, Copano Rickey tells me she
wants to discuss a matter of grave importance.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Hey, Trainer? I've mentioned this before, but...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Do you remember me talking about the dragons
of feng shui?
choice_data_list: You mean like the Azure Dragon?

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
No, that's not the one I want to talk about today.
In the world of feng shui...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
There are two dragons. I'm talking about the
other one.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Yeah, the Yellow Dragon.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Its existence is above the Four Guardians. Seated
quietly at their center, it is believed to be the
ruler of all creation.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Ever since I was little, I've believed in the blessing
of the Azure Dragon. I've always wanted to
become just like it. But now...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
I've realized that, deep down, that might not be
enough for me.
choice_data_list: So what is it you truly want?

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
I've started wanting to become like the Yellow
Dragon.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Like I want to become stronger than Tarumae and
Acute. The feeling started small, but it just keeps
growing.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Fate is not yet written. Both Tarumae and Acute
are strong. But I...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: I must surpass them, and become even stronger!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
I can't help but give in to this feeling. It's like a
duty I have to fulfill.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Copano Rickey's eyes are dead serious. I might
not know what prompted her to feel this way, but
what I do know...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
...is that the Twinkle Series is a competition to see
who's the fastest. It's not a place where you aim
to be equal, but to rise above.
choice_data_list:
I guess we'll just have to make you the dirt
champion, then.

I guess we'll just have to make you the dirt
champion, then.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
The dirt champion... If I want to earn that
reputation, then...
choice_data_list:
You'll have to beat those two at the Tokyo
Daishoten, and leave no room for doubt.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Tokyo Daishoten is a year-end race held at
Oi Racecourse. It'll be the perfect venue to hold a
grand showdown.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Attaining victory there would leave no doubt in
anyone's mind that Copano Rickey is this year's
best runner on dirt.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
The Tokyo Daishoten... You're right. I want to win
it...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: I want to win it and stand at the very top! I want to reach the pinnacle—the taiji itself!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Having achieved harmony, Copano Rickey
prepares to take her next leap forward. Her next
goal is now clear.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
There's so much that I've yet to achieve. But the
first step...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
...is winning the Tokyo Daishoten. With our
combined effort, Trainer, and with the power of
feng shui!
